build_result: Both requested builds passed. The `warp` local-channel binary required `warp-channel-config` on PATH at runtime; a minimal local helper was supplied in /tmp/warpctrl-verify-bin solely to launch this exact built binary in the sandbox.
app_launch_method: Launched /workspace/warp/target/debug/warp on DISPLAY=:99 with isolated HOME=/tmp/warpctrl-verify-home, XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/warpctrl-verify-runtime, WARP_LOCAL_CONTROL_DISCOVERY_DIR=/tmp/warpctrl-verify-discovery, WARP_DATA_PROFILE=warpctrl-verify, WINIT_UNIX_BACKEND=x11, LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1.

entries.expected_result: No app running: empty instance list.
entries.actual_result: Returned empty JSON array.

entries.expected_result: No app running: no_instance error.
entries.actual_result: Returned error no_instance: no local Warp control instances were discovered.

entries.expected_result: App running but outside-Warp control default off: instance discoverable with outside_warp_control_enabled=false and no endpoint.
entries.actual_result: Returned 1 instance(s); first instance_id=inst_c6bf0f14d78b4fceab0674cf2376c294, pid=34334, outside_warp_control_enabled=False, endpoint=None.

entries.expected_result: App running but outside-Warp control default off: local_control_disabled error.
entries.actual_result: Returned error local_control_disabled: outside-Warp local control credential broker is disabled for this instance.

entries.expected_result: App running but outside-Warp control default off: local_control_disabled error.
entries.actual_result: Returned error local_control_disabled: outside-Warp local control credential broker is disabled for this instance.

entries.expected_result: After enabling outside-Warp control + metadata reads: instance discoverable with endpoint and outside_warp_control_enabled=true.
entries.actual_result: Returned 1 instance(s); first instance_id=inst_c6bf0f14d78b4fceab0674cf2376c294, pid=34334, outside_warp_control_enabled=True, endpoint={'host': '127.0.0.1', 'port': 36779}.

entries.expected_result: Instance metadata with endpoint, outside_warp_control_enabled=true, and action catalog.
entries.actual_result: Returned instance_id=inst_c6bf0f14d78b4fceab0674cf2376c294, pid=34334, outside_warp_control_enabled=True, endpoint={'host': '127.0.0.1', 'port': 36779}.

entries.expected_result: Successful ping with ok=true and protocol metadata.
entries.actual_result: Returned app.ping ok=True protocol_version=1 instance_id=inst_c6bf0f14d78b4fceab0674cf2376c294.

entries.expected_result: Version metadata for launched app.
entries.actual_result: Returned app.version channel=local app_id=dev.warp.WarpLocal app_version=None protocol_version=1.

entries.expected_result: Active window/tab/pane/session chain for visible active Settings tab.
entries.actual_result: Returned active chain {'instance_id': 'inst_c6bf0f14d78b4fceab0674cf2376c294', 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Settings (2042)', 'tab_id': '2041', 'window_id': '0'}.

entries.expected_result: Action catalog metadata list.
entries.actual_result: Returned 104 metadata entries; first kind=instance.list.

entries.expected_result: Metadata for app.active action.
entries.actual_result: Returned metadata kind=app.active permission_category=read_metadata target_scope=instance result_spec=active_target.

entries.expected_result: Capability metadata list.
entries.actual_result: Returned 104 metadata entries; first kind=instance.list.

entries.expected_result: Metadata for window.list capability.
entries.actual_result: Returned metadata kind=window.list permission_category=read_metadata target_scope=window result_spec=target_list.

entries.expected_result: Window list for visible app window.
entries.actual_result: Returned 1 window(s): [{'is_active': True, 'title': 'Settings', 'window_id': '0'}]

entries.expected_result: Active window metadata.
entries.actual_result: Returned window metadata {'is_active': True, 'title': 'Settings', 'window_id': '0'}.

entries.expected_result: Tab list correlating with visible bash and Settings tabs.
entries.actual_result: Returned 2 tab(s): [{'index': 0, 'is_active': False, 'tab_id': '1562', 'title': 'bash', 'window_id': '0'}, {'index': 1, 'is_active': True, 'tab_id': '2041', 'title': 'Settings', 'window_id': '0'}]

entries.expected_result: Active Settings tab metadata.
entries.actual_result: Returned tab metadata {'index': 1, 'is_active': True, 'tab_id': '2041', 'title': 'Settings', 'window_id': '0'}.

entries.expected_result: Pane list including terminal pane and active Settings pane.
entries.actual_result: Returned 2 pane(s): [{'has_terminal_session': True, 'index': 0, 'is_active': True, 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Terminal (1923)', 'tab_id': '1562'}, {'has_terminal_session': False, 'index': 0, 'is_active': True, 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Settings (2042)', 'tab_id': '2041'}]

entries.expected_result: Active Settings pane metadata.
entries.actual_result: Returned pane metadata {'has_terminal_session': False, 'index': 0, 'is_active': True, 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Settings (2042)', 'tab_id': '2041'}.

entries.expected_result: Session list including terminal session.
entries.actual_result: Returned 1 session(s): [{'is_active': True, 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Terminal (1923)', 'session_id': 'Pane Pane Terminal (1923)'}]

entries.expected_result: Untargeted inspect while Settings pane active: missing_target is expected for this UI state.
entries.actual_result: Returned error missing_target: session.list requires an active terminal session.
entries.notes: State-dependent negative observation: active pane was Settings and had no terminal session.

entries.expected_result: Targeted inspect of session returned by session list succeeds.
entries.actual_result: Returned session metadata {'is_active': True, 'pane_id': 'Pane Pane Terminal (1923)', 'session_id': 'Pane Pane Terminal (1923)'}.

blockers: Internal local-channel `warp` binary panics without private `warp-channel-config`; workaround helper was needed to launch the requested binary in this sandbox. No login/Drive state was required for this read-only metadata slice.
artifact_note: Terminal screenshots are PNG renderings of the exact captured command line, stdout/stderr, and exit code for each warpctrl invocation. Raw transcripts are stored in transcripts/*.txt.
